Body.Content:
Multiple MAM (Mobile Application Management) Intune Accounts will now be supported in Outlook for iOS. Only one MDM (mobile device management) account will be supported at a time per device.

More info: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/dlp-exchange-conditions-and-actions#recipients

GA date: May CY2026

message.Title: Outlook: Multiple Intune Accounts for Outlook on iOS
